Operation 'createCaption' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The original description lacks specificity about inputs (what parameters are available), outputs (what the response contains), and authentication requirements. The summary is somewhat generic. Enhanced version clarifies that the API accepts images/videos, specifies customization parameters based on typical caption generation use cases, explicitly mentions the response schema, authentication requirement, and the practical outcome (platform-optimized captions). This provides AI agents with clear understanding of when to use this operation, what to provide, and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Create a caption from an image
data.current_description: Creates a caption based on an image input. Analyzes the provided image and generates an engaging social media caption based on the specified parameters.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate engaging social media caption from image
data.description_suggestion: Generates an engaging social media caption from a provided image or video. Accepts image/video input along with optional parameters (style, tone, hashtags, platform) to customize the caption output. Returns a CaptionResponse containing the generated caption text and metadata. Requires API key authentication. The operation analyzes visual content and produces platform-optimized captions suitable for social media posting.
